query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `domains` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `currentPrice` int NOT NULL,
  `lastChecked` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `priceAlerts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `domainId` int NOT NULL,
  `targetPrice` int NOT NULL,
  `isActive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `lastChecked` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`domainId`) REFERENCES `domains`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `monitoringLogs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `alertId` int NULL,
  `domainName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `currentPrice` int NOT NULL,
  `targetPrice` int NOT NULL,
  `triggered` int NOT NULL,
  `notificationSent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `message` text NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`alertId`) REFERENCES `priceAlerts`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `priceHistory` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `domainId` int NOT NULL,
  `price` int NOT NULL,
  `recordedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`domainId`) REFERENCES `domains`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `userProjects` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `projectName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `niche` varchar(255) NULL,
  `industry` varchar(255) NULL,
  `keywords` text NULL,
  `targetAudience` text NULL,
  `description` text NULL,
  `goals` text NULL,
  `preferredExtensions` text NULL,
  `namingStyle` varchar(50) NULL,
  `competitorUrl` varchar(500) NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `domainSuggestions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `suggestedDomain` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `tld` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `reasoning` text NULL,
  `namingPattern` varchar(50) NULL,
  `confidence` int NULL,
  `brandScore` int NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `userProjects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `nicheAnalysis` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `detectedIndustry` text NULL,
  `nicheData` text NULL,
  `tldRecommendations` text NULL,
  `competitorAnalysis` text NULL,
  `marketInsights` text NULL,
  `buyerPersona` text NULL,
  `monetization` text NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `userProjects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `domainComments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `domainId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `comment` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`domainId`) REFERENCES `analyzedDomains`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `savedComparisons` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NULL,
  `domainIds` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projectDomains` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `domainName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'added',
  `availableTlds` text NULL,
  `availabilityChecked` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `notes` text NULL,
  `addedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `userProjects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `usageLog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `action` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `resourceCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `timestamp` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `metadata` text NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `creditTransactions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('purchase','deduction','refund','bonus') NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `balance` int NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `relatedAction` varchar(50) NULL,
  `metadata` text NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ipRateLimits` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `ipAddress` varchar(45) NOT NULL,
  `action` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `requestCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `windowStart` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastRequest` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `blocked` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `metadata` text NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `forensicAnalysisResults` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `domainName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `finalTier` enum('Tier 1','Tier 2','Tier 3','Tier 4') NOT NULL,
  `riskLevel` enum('Safe','Moderate','Critical') NOT NULL,
  `primaryIdentity` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `badges` text NOT NULL,
  `reasoning` text NOT NULL,
  `evidence` text NOT NULL,
  `historicalSnapshots` text NOT NULL,
  `analyzedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `userId` int NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `cache` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `cacheKey` varchar(512) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `cacheValue` text NOT NULL,
  `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `launchPlans` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NULL,
  `domain` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `summary` text NOT NULL,
  `estimatedCompletionDays` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  `completedTasksCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalTasksCount` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','completed','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `generatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `userProjects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `launchTasks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `planId` int NOT NULL,
  `taskId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `action` text NOT NULL,
  `priority` enum('high','medium','low') NOT NULL,
  `category` enum('zombie_page','keyword_content','technical','marketing') NOT NULL,
  `estimatedTime` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `url` varchar(500) NULL,
  `keyword` varchar(255) NULL,
  `targetWordCount` int NULL,
  `completed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `notes` text NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`planId`) REFERENCES `launchPlans`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `weeklyPulseChecks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `domainName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `checkDate` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `homePageIndexed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `homePageUrl` varchar(500) NULL,
  `zombiePageUrl` varchar(500) NULL,
  `zombiePageIndexed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `primaryKeyword` varchar(255) NULL,
  `rank` int NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','indexed','ranking','building_trust') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `userProjects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pulseReports` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `reportDate` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `newPagesIndexed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `keywordsInTop100` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalPagesIndexed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalKeywordsRanking` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `emailSent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `emailSentAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `userProjects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projectKeywords` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `keyword` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `isEnriched` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `enrichedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `searchVolume` int NULL,
  `difficulty` int NULL,
  `cpc` decimal(10,2) NULL,
  `competition` decimal(3,2) NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `userProjects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `apiKeys` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `keyPrefix` varchar(12) NOT NULL,
  `keyHash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `lastUsedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `revokedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
